name: sanity-log-analyzer
description: Parse Sanity request logs (NDJSON) into an offline HTML report, no server required.
author: Nathan Nye <nathan@nye.dev> (https://nye.dev)

scripts.build:core: rm -rf dist && tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.render-types.json && rm -f dist/types.d.ts && npm run build:report && rm -f dist/report/render.css && find dist -name '*.map' -delete
scripts.build:test-support: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc -p tsconfig.test-support.json && mkdir -p .test-dist/report && cp dist/report/render.js .test-dist/report/
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test-support && node --test '.test-dist/**/*.test.js'
